purpose: Close four reviewed exchange candidates after promotion through D-1000 BX22.

entries.notes: BX22 promotes World Markets after current first-party MegaETH spot, perpetual, lending, and unified-margin documentation plus independent TVL, fee, revenue, spot-volume, and perpetual-volume verification.
BX22 promotes Prism DEX after current first-party MegaETH swap-interface review and independent concentrated-liquidity TVL, fee, revenue, and DEX-volume verification.
BX22 promotes Nado after current first-party Ink trading-interface review and independent spot-volume, perpetual-volume, TVL, fee, revenue, and open-interest verification.
BX22 promotes InkySwap after first-party AMM, liquidity, and InkyPump-linked trading review plus independent Ink-chain protocol verification.
